calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2007 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Set For Trial On Sep-24-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Sep-06-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 220

Default Prove-Up Hearing (As To Defendant: Harr & Assoc)
Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Salceda.
Jack Valinoti, Esq. for Plaintiff: SMS Financial XIV, LLC.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
Order allowing SEVERAL JUDGMENT granted and signed in open court, matter may remain pending as to Defendant: Steven K. Harr.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering the declaration of Chris Kahler, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Co-Defendant: Harr and Associates as follows:
Damages $103,774.15
Prejudgment Interest $13,341.41
Attorney's Fees $4,309.30
Costs $335.00, for a total of $121,759.86
Judgment signed in open court.
